ddls:
CREATE TABLE "universities" (
  "university_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each university */,
  "university_name" TEXT /* Name of the university */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the university */,
  "website" TEXT /* University website */,
  "established_date" TEXT /* Date the university was established */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the university */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("university_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "faculties" (
  "faculty_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each faculty */,
  "university_id" INTEGER /* ID of the university the faculty belongs to */,
  "faculty_name" TEXT /* Name of the faculty */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the faculty */,
  "dean" TEXT /* Name of the faculty dean */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Faculty contact email */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("faculty_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_faculties_university_id FOREIGN KEY ("university_id") REFERENCES universities ("university_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "courses" (
  "course_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each course */,
  "course_name" TEXT /* Name of the course */,
  "course_level" TEXT /* Level of the course (e.g., bachelor, master) */,
  "course_type" TEXT /* Type of the course (e.g., undergraduate, graduate) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the course */,
  "university_id" INTEGER /* ID of the university the course belongs to */,
  "faculty_id" INTEGER /* ID of the faculty the course belongs to */,
  "credits" INTEGER /* Number of credits for the course */,
  "duration" TEXT /* Duration of the course (e.g., 3 years) */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the course */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the course */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("course_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_courses_faculty_id FOREIGN KEY ("faculty_id") REFERENCES faculties ("faculty_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_courses_university_id FOREIGN KEY ("university_id") REFERENCES universities ("university_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "course_locations" (
  "location_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each course location */,
  "course_id" INTEGER /* ID of the course the location belongs to */,
  "location" TEXT /* Name of the location (e.g., on-campus, online) */,
  "location_type" TEXT /* Type of the location (e.g., on-campus, online) */,
  "capacity" INTEGER /* Capacity of the location */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("location_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_course_locations_course_id FOREIGN KEY ("course_id") REFERENCES courses ("course_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "course_links" (
  "link_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each course link */,
  "course_id" INTEGER /* ID of the course the link belongs to */,
  "link" TEXT /* Link to the course page on the university website */,
  "link_type" TEXT /* Type of the link (e.g., course description, course schedule) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("link_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_course_links_course_id FOREIGN KEY ("course_id") REFERENCES courses ("course_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "students" (
  "student_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each student */,
  "student_name" TEXT /* Name of the student */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the student */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password for the student's account */,
  "enrollment_date" TEXT /* Date the student enrolled */,
  "graduation_date" TEXT /* Date the student graduated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("student_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "enrollments" (
  "enrollment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each enrollment */,
  "course_id" INTEGER /* ID of the course the student is enrolled in */,
  "student_id" INTEGER /* ID of the student */,
  "enrollment_date" TEXT /* Date the student enrolled in the course */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the enrollment (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("enrollment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_enrollments_student_id FOREIGN KEY ("student_id") REFERENCES students ("student_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_enrollments_course_id FOREIGN KEY ("course_id") REFERENCES courses ("course_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "staff" (
  "staff_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each staff member */,
  "staff_name" TEXT /* Name of the staff member */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the staff member */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password for the staff member's account */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the staff member (e.g., lecturer, tutor) */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department the staff member belongs to */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("staff_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "course_progress" (
  "progress_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each progress entry */,
  "enrollment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the enrollment the progress belongs to */,
  "progress_date" TEXT /* Date the progress was recorded */,
  "progress" TEXT /* Progress of the student in the course (e.g., pass, fail) */,
  "grade" TEXT /* Grade of the student in the course (e.g., A, B) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("progress_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_course_progress_enrollment_id FOREIGN KEY ("enrollment_id") REFERENCES enrollments ("enrollment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "course_reviews" (
  "review_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each review */,
  "course_id" INTEGER /* ID of the course the review belongs to */,
  "review_date" TEXT /* Date the review was recorded */,
  "review" TEXT /* Review of the course (e.g., excellent, poor) */,
  "rating" INTEGER /* Rating of the course (e.g., 1-5) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("review_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_course_reviews_course_id FOREIGN KEY ("course_id") REFERENCES courses ("course_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "faculty_performance" (
  "performance_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each performance entry */,
  "faculty_id" INTEGER /* ID of the faculty the performance belongs to */,
  "performance_date" TEXT /* Date the performance was recorded */,
  "performance" TEXT /* Performance of the faculty (e.g., excellent, poor) */,
  "ranking" INTEGER /* Ranking of the faculty (e.g., 1-10) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("performance_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_faculty_performance_faculty_id FOREIGN KEY ("faculty_id") REFERENCES faculties ("faculty_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "course_statistics" (
  "statistics_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each statistics entry */,
  "course_id" INTEGER /* ID of the course the statistics belong to */,
  "statistics_date" TEXT /* Date the statistics were recorded */,
  "enrollment_count" INTEGER /* Number of students enrolled in the course */,
  "pass_rate" REAL /* Pass rate of the course (e.g., 0.8, 0.9) */,
  "average_grade" REAL /* Average grade of the course (e.g., 75, 80) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("statistics_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_course_statistics_course_id FOREIGN KEY ("course_id") REFERENCES courses ("course_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "course_recommendations" (
  "recommendation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each recommendation */,
  "course_id" INTEGER /* ID of the course the recommendation belongs to */,
  "recommended_course_id" INTEGER /* ID of the recommended course */,
  "recommendation_date" TEXT /* Date the recommendation was recorded */,
  "reason" TEXT /* Reason for the recommendation (e.g., similar courses, prerequisite) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("recommendation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_course_recommendations_recommended_course_id FOREIGN KEY ("recommended_course_id") REFERENCES courses ("course_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_course_recommendations_course_id FOREIGN KEY ("course_id") REFERENCES courses ("course_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the role */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* Permissions associated with the role (e.g., view courses, edit courses) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_permissions" (
  "permission_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each permission */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* ID of the role the permission belongs to */,
  "permission_name" TEXT /* Name of the permission */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the permission */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("permission_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_permissions_role_id FOREIGN KEY ("role_id") REFERENCES user_roles ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_sessions" (
  "session_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each session */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user the session belongs to */,
  "session_start_date" TEXT /* Date the session started */,
  "session_end_date" TEXT /* Date the session ended */,
  "login_ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user's login */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("session_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "system_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each log */,
  "log_date" TEXT /* Date the log was recorded */,
  "log_level" TEXT /* Level of the log (e.g., info, error) */,
  "log_message" TEXT /* Message of the log */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id")
)
